chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-763 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE (Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 3126/2023 3.For hearing of main case 06-09-2023 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
